en.name: Level 5 — Terror Hotel
en.shortDescription: An infinite 1930s hotel of mahogany halls and self-cleaning vintage rooms, haunted by whispers and clouds of deadly insects.
en.atmosphere: Pristine early-20th-century luxury turned unsettling: random smooth jazz, watching portraits, phantom taps in empty halls.
en.tips: Avoid dark rooms where insects nest. Stay in furnished areas. Never use maintenance elevators or go above floor 12.
